GeneralExplanationGrp.MediumExplanationTxt: NO TRANSFER WAS MADE IN 2024 TO GAPCO CDA (L) BLOCKER - CLASS A, LTD FROM THE FOUNDATION. GAPCO CDA (L) BLOCKER - CLASS A, LTD IS NOT AN EXCESS BUSINESS HOLDING OF THE FOUNDATION. THE ONLY TRANFERS MADE DURING 2024 WERE NET DISTRIBUTIONS FOR $22,476 TO THE FOUNDATION FROM GAPCO CDA (L) BLOCKER - CLASS B, LTD. GAPCO CDA (L) BLOCKER - CLASS B, LTD IS NOT AN EXCESS BUSINESS HOLDING OF THE FOUNDATION. NO TRANSFER WAS MADE IN 2024 TO GAPCO CDA (L) BLOCKER - CLASS D, LTD FROM THE FOUNDATION. RECONCILIATION OF NET GAIN/(LOSS) FROM SALES OF ASSETS NOT INCLUDED IN PART IV TOTAL INCLUDED IN PART IV: (DETAILS BELOW) NET GAIN/(LOSS): $2,697,824 TOTAL NOT INCLUDED IN PART IV: PASSTHROUGH K-1 CAPITAL GAIN/(LOSS) - UBI NET GAIN/(LOSS): $74,716 TOTAL PART I, LINE 6A: $2,772,540 DETAILS OF ASSETS INCLUDED IN PART IV: RECLASS SECTION 751 SALE OF PARTNERSHIP RECLASS NET GAIN/(LOSS): $(1,045) PASSTHROUGH K-1 CAPITAL GAIN/(LOSS) - NON UBI NET GAIN/(LOSS): $1,203,751 GAPCO III (L) BLOCKER - CLASS N CAPITAL GAIN NET GAIN/(LOSS): $414,872 GAPCO CDA (L) BLOCKER - CLASS L CAPITAL GAIN NET GAIN/(LOSS): $1,078,767 DISTRIBUTIONS IN EXCESS OF BASIS NET GAIN/(LOSS): $1,479

The Foundation has prepared these forms to the best of its ability based on the limited information provided to it by the investments on which the Foundation is reporting and on the basis of having received no information to the contrary. Any missing or incomplete information is due to the Foundation's inability to obtain such information and is not a willful attempt to withhold such information.
